preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City vs San Diego FC: Zavagnin lamenta las luchas del primer tiempo antes de la visita del líder de la liga
preReview.description: Un Sporting Kansas City en dificultades recibe a los líderes de la tabla, San Diego FC, en el Children’s Mercy Park el sábado.

preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City vs San Diego FC: Zavagnin lamenta le difficoltà del primo tempo prima della visita dei leader della lega
preReview.description: Un traballante Sporting Kansas City ospita i capolista San Diego FC al Children's Mercy Park sabato.

preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City v San Diego FC: Zavagnin laments first-half struggles ahead of league-leaders’ visit
preReview.description: A struggling Sporting Kansas City host high-flying table-toppers San Diego FC at Children’s Mercy Park on Saturday.

preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City x San Diego FC: Zavagnin lamenta dificuldades no primeiro tempo antes da visita dos líderes da liga
preReview.description: Um Sporting Kansas City em dificuldades recebe o líder San Diego FC no alto da tabela no Children's Mercy Park no sábado.

preReview.description: Un Sporting Kansas City en difficulté accueille les leaders du classement San Diego FC au Children's Mercy Park samedi.

preReview.title: Sporting Kansas City gegen San Diego FC: Zavagnin beklagt erste Halbzeit-Schwächen vor Besuch der Tabellenführer
preReview.description: Ein kämpfendes Sporting Kansas City empfängt am Samstag die in Hochform befindlichen Tabellenführer San Diego FC im Children’s Mercy Park.

preReview.title: سبورتينغ كانساس سيتي ضد سان دييغو إف سي: زيفاغنين يأسى على معاناة الشوط الأول مع اقتراب زيارة متصدري الدوري

QAData.question: Who won between Sporting Kansas City and San Diego FC on Sun, 10 Aug 2025 00:45:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: San Diego FC won 2–0 over Sporting Kansas City on Sun, 10 Aug 2025 00:45:00 GMT.
